overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction game showing a character in a spacesuit walking through a futuristic city plaza. The character moves from a covered walkway past a United Colonies security building into an open plaza with a fountain and towering futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway approaching security checkpoint

events.description: exiting the narrow corridor into the wider security plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway toward the United Colonies security building

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in casual clothing walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: geometric glass and metal roof structure overhead with triangular framework
futuristic security checkpoint building with UC logo and orange striped barriers
construction barrier with orange and white diagonal stripes
digital warning sign with orange text mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered pedestrian corridor with a geometric glass roof overhead. Orange construction barriers line the left side as the character approaches the United Colonies security building visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: security checkpoint plaza with geometric shadow patterns

events.description: character turns slightly right to approach the ramp entrance
passing the UC security building and entering the open city plaza

agents.ego_description: walking up the inclined ramp toward the transit station, passing security personnel

notable_agents.action: security guard in uniform standing near the building entrance

entered.detail: overhead directional signs pointing to hotel and station with blue text
tall white and glass towers with curved organic architecture
silver metallic posts lining the walkway entrance

segments.scene_description: Moving through the security plaza, the character ascends a ramp passing the UC security building on the left. Geometric shadows from the overhead structure pattern the concrete ground as futuristic skyscrapers become visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: central city plaza with fountain and sculpture

events.description: entering the main plaza with the circular fountain and arch sculpture

agents.ego_description: walking around the plaza, observing the fountain and surrounding futuristic architecture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white and green outfit walking past the camera

entered.detail: large circular water feature with lily pads and stone edges
silver curved arch structure spanning over the fountain pool
towering white and teal buildings with organic curved designs and hanging gardens
sculpted green trees and vegetation lining the plaza walkways

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide open plaza featuring a circular fountain with a metallic arch sculpture. Tall futuristic towers rise in the background while pedestrians walk through the sunlit space with decorative trees lining the walkways.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined pedestrian corridor into a sprawling, sunlit futuristic plaza. It begins beneath a geometric glass roof, moving past orange construction barriers toward the distant United Colonies security building. As the character advances, the scene shifts to a security plaza where the camera ascends a ramp, passing the security building while geometric shadows pattern the concrete ground. The view then opens wide as the character enters a bright plaza featuring a circular fountain with a metallic arch sculpture. Finally, the environment expands to reveal towering skyscrapers and pedestrians walking among decorative trees under a clear, open sky.
